mapper.select: select token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, used_at, created_at from password_reset_tokens where user_id = #{userId} and used_at is null and expires_at > NOW() order by token_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into password_reset_tokens (user_id, token_hash, expires_at) values (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update: update password_reset_tokens set used_at = NOW() where token_id = #{tokenId} and used_at is null
update password_reset_tokens set used_at = NOW() where user_id = #{userId} and used_at is null
mapper.delete: delete from password_reset_tokens where expires_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
